author.bio: Assistant Professor @WOUNews. Materials/physical chemist. Sneaking memes, puns, cats, and dogs into chemistry whenever I get a chance. She/Her
author.name: Feier Hou 😺🐶⚗️📚

content.text:
Student:" is the cactus the wavefunction in the Schrödinger equation?"
Me: "the what?"
Student: "the cactus! That!"

They then pointed at psi...🤣🤣
